payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a matte finish, shown mostly along the left edge of the image and partially cut off at top and bottom; a small projecting upper box is visible on the right side of the cabinet, surface shows minor wear and shadowing, and it appears to be about 1.0–1.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wood cabinet, edge-cropped","long_description":"Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a matte finish, shown mostly along the left edge of the image and partially cut off at top and bottom; a small projecting upper box is visible on the right side of the cabinet, surface shows minor wear and shadowing, and it appears to be about 1.0–1.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown wood","vertical paneled doors","matte finish","tall and narrow","projecting upper box","surface wear/scuffs","shadowed lighting","partial/edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
